SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers

Class RustCatalogProvider

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.RustCatalogProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FlightSqlFederatedCatalog
public abstract class RustCatalogProvider extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Handle for a CatalogProvider constructed on the Rust side.

Instances are produced by per-backend factory classes (for example, FlightSqlFederatedCatalog) and registered with a session via SessionContext.registerCatalog(String, RustCatalogProvider). Unlike the user-implementable CatalogProvider interface, a RustCatalogProvider requires no Java-side callbacks — the backing catalog lives entirely in Rust. 

try (FlightSqlFederatedCatalog remote = FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.builder()
        .endpoint("http://localhost:32010")
        .computeContext("remote1")
        .table("users")
        .table("orders")
        .build();
    SessionContext ctx = SessionContext.newWithFederation(ConfigOptions.defaults())) {
    ctx.registerCatalog("remote1", remote);
    ctx.sql("SELECT * FROM remote1.public.users WHERE id = 1").show();
}

Instances must be closed exactly once. Registering a provider with a session does not transfer ownership; callers still close the handle when no longer needed.

See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: CatalogProvider

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfRustCatalogProvider handle()
      Internal accessor used by SessionContextBridge to call the Rust-side registration. Not intended for application code; treat the returned opaque as internal.
